title: 5Plus 10-Pack LR44 AG13 357 303 SR44 A76 675 392 394 384 376 1.5V Alkaline Button Cell Batteries – Ideal for Watches, Hearing Aids, Glucometers, Key Fobs, Car Keys, and Small Electronics
features: Wide Compatibility: Works with multiple models including LR44, AG13, 357, 303, SR44, A76, 675, 392, 394, 384, 376 – perfect for watches, hearing aids, glucometers, key fobs, car keys, and more
Long-Lasting Power: 1.5V alkaline button cell batteries deliver reliable and consistent performance for your small electronics
Versatile & Cost-Effective: Ideal for everyday electronics such as watches, hearing aids, remote controls, key fobs, glucometers, and more
Safe, Mercury-free and leak-resistant design ensures a safe, environmentally-friendly option for powering your devices
Convenient 10-Pack: Includes 10 batteries for great value, ensuring you have a reliable supply of batteries for all your essential devices
